input: coref: wb | _ At the height of the Old West , there stands a band of lawmen and women who do what must be done , even when they do n't want to harm another . Jeff is one of them , his short gray hair and gray beard ust beneath his brown felt hat a testiment to his time spent upo this Earth . His eyes fixateed on the brown horse beneath him as he begins his dismount , the negative aspects of age showing with the pain on his face . ** _ As he struggles to dismounnt his horse , showcases the lack of grace that comes with age , fellow lawman Matt and Lawwomen Hailee arrive , both looking on and marveling at the spectical before them , the dense forest of everygreen trees behind them in full view against a grassland that has seen better days . _ As Jeff takes the reins of his horse , which seems reluctantly willing to couperate with him , his frame becomes engulfed by his heavy gray coat , a hint at the harsh cold , despite the prevelance of sunlight . Matt looks on , steadying his horse , as it attempts to react the the distress of Jeff 's horse . Hailee , in her drark gray overcoat and gray felt hat , as still as her horse as she looks on at both of them . _ Matt sits upon his horse , his face showing wringles and a brown mushstache which shows that he is far from young himself , his right hand resting on his horses reins and his left slumped at his side . A look of concer and unease on his face , the vastness of the wilderness behind him . _ Despite the lack of grace from his dismount , Jeff is instilled with confidence . With thhe knowledge that they will win this day agaist the outlaws , just as the group had done many times before . His right had raising his pistol upwards and his eyes fixated on their target . The worries and frustrations of age leaving his face , being replaced with a steel reserve and determinatio that is unmatched . _ Matt , despite his advanced age and his percieved experience , is still unsure of himself . Unsure of if he can still do what must be done . Looking at his own pistol closely as if to find some reason as to why he ca n't fight today , why he ca n't take another life . The mixture of emotions filling his mind as he reasons that he will save lives , while having to take another . Wondering if the life of a lawman in the Old West was his choice out of necessity , rather then true desire .

input: coref: wb | _ Father Joe appeared amidst the chaos with two off-duty soldiers . He proclaimed that a very special event was about to take place . He raised his hands and stood in front of a makeshift tabernacle . Explosions rocked the land behind him . ** _ Just then a chopper descended from the sky . Instead of artillery and ammunition , it lowered a young calf . _ The soldiers looked on in disbelief . A cow ? How is that going to help us in the fight ? The sun set and a sense of calm and confusion washed over the battlefield . _ Martin clapped and smiled . He was the only one that knew what was going on . This was a ceremonial feast the villagers used to honor their ancestors . But now a feast to boost the morale of the soldiers . _ Frederic rubbed his hands together expecting a good meal . Martin assured him that it would be the best he 's ever had . _ Laurence and Albert were n't so sure . They were vegetarians and could n't eat anything being offered . Instead they grabbed a six pack of Budweiser and pulled out some playing cards . Something to pass the time . _ Martin cracked open a Budweiser too . This was a celebration after all . Meanwhile the cow was made into a soup and ready . _ The ceremonial soup was passed around along with plans for tomorrow 's battle . The men laughed as they sampled the soup while going over battle plans . They tried to guess the ingredients while strategizing for war . _ As the men savored the soup , laughter rang out across the camp . The men temporarily forgot about the war . The strangeness and warmth that day brought to the battlefield would make it memorable , not because of its grandeur .
